[{"key":"0.774143055535244112","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.87d2bb2883dbb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1920/h_1080/50364/157597/2024/3/25/280646.png","//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/orc/role_picture1/6cea72bc-4bad-4dfc-ab52-c42b7360ec96.png"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1200/h_1920/50364/157597/2024/3/25/76978.png","//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/orc/role_picture2/7d80c213-41ef-4f69-8bd3-fe828c4ac995.png"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.f8f4fc4f912b3","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"海因里希"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者海因里希，身份编码S09-042191，ReA芯片状态故障，履历最后的更新日期停留在屋都大停机事件之前。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"与晋经的新闻报道的图像数据进行仔细对比后，终于得出来确定的结论一一面前这个表情阴冷、死气沉沉且黑眼卷深重的男青年，确实是曾经屋海集团掌门人菲尔特的养子无误。由于与过去图像的差异过大，为了进行准确对比E.O.S.甚全动用了最先进的人脸识别程序。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"没人能想象，曾经那个非尔特家的温利和贵公子，究竟是遭遇了怎样的磨难，才沦落为如今的模样，而海因里希本人也鲜少提及这段过往。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而现在，海因里希是E-07无人不知的死神，他的枪口，会对准每个美梦俱乐部的故人。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"SSR"}]}]}},{"key":"0.502fb7b7fb545","title" er":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.e7d0741f09395","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/758801.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果命中提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果命中+"},{"text":"12%","color":"#ff0000"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/357114.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害提升和伤害减免","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害额外提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害额外降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【往事如梦】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"蜃海集团的生活已经在记忆里显得有些模糊，但那段日子还是会时常出现在海因里希的梦里。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他梦见温和的父亲，菲尔特。上了年纪的男人对他和莉莉丝伸出手，对他们说，以后他会成为他们的家人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他梦见以蜃海集团的名义举办的晚宴，香槟杯碰撞的清脆响声不绝于耳，在父亲的带领下，他穿过人群，周围那些富商名流看向他时，目光或是尊敬、或是讨好。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他梦见自己跑到父亲面前，天真地说想要学习战斗的方法，这样才能在危险的源病毒爆发中保护每个家人。父亲听后微微一笑，转而说要让管家给他找最好的老师一很快，他就看见了那个忠心耿耿的菲尔特家总管，鲁伯特。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"每当想起那张脸的时候，海因里希就会从梦中惊醒，看见低矮灰暗的天花板，听见隔壁美梦俱乐部舞池里的喧嚣，感受到被汗水浸湿、紧贴着后背的冰冷衣衫。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"海因里希捏紧了拳头，但很快又松开。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"拿起放在床头的双枪，他翻身下床，「美梦俱乐部敌人名单」上，还有还几个名字没被红线划去。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【复仇做火，恨为柴薪】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"有一段记忆，是海因里希永远也不会忘记的。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"蜃都爆发了源病毒危机，整片区域都被熔断，熔断生物肆意横行。在混乱中，外出办公的菲尔特被熔断生物杀害，而留守在宅邸的海因里希和莉莉斯被成群的熔断生物追逐。他们筋疲力尽地躲进一间房间，反锁上门，祈祷着不要被熔断生物发现。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"不知过了多久，他听见了一阵脚步声，声音杂乱，但速度不疾不徐。那些脚步声逐渐走进，最终在隔壁那个与他们一墙之隔的房间前站定，紧接着是一声巨响，像是办公室沉重的大门被蛮力撞开。随后，他听见人在说话的声音。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「哼，这老东西，死了也要给人添麻烦，把这破宅子建得那么复杂。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"鲁伯特，这是鲁伯特的声音，他和莉莉斯太熟悉那个人了，绝不会听错。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「也不知道那两个小鬼头躲哪去了，不能让他们活着离开这里。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他的呼吸几乎停滞，鲁伯特说的「那两个小鬼头」，就是他和莉莉斯。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那你可要加油啊，追杀他们，可不在我的工作范畴里。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"另外一个声音响起，是个陌生的女人，海因里希并辨认不出那是谁，应该是鲁伯特找的帮手，但已经不重要了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"那一刻，怒火充满了他的胸腔—一鲁伯特，这个人背叛了菲尔特，背叛了他和莉莉斯，背叛了整个蜃海集团。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【绝路无归期】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「痛吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"冰冷的镊子夹着沾满药物的棉球，不怀好意地狠狠捅在伤口上。海因里希本想不动声色地忍耐过去，但疼痛终究让他的眉毛拧成一团。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「呵，痛就对了。这世界上，也就只剩下你这种被冲昏了头脑的人，不掂量掂量自己的实力，就想对那种大人物发起复仇。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"白发的女实验员将染红的棉球丢弃，随后又丢给海因里希一卷绷带，示意他自己给自己缠上。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「记住这份疼痛，这份恨意，以及这份屈辱吧。等你获得了强大的力量，就可以把这一切，加倍奉还，不仅是那个践踏你们尊严的家伙，还有那些附庸在他身边的、背叛了你们的人。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她的话像毒蛇，缠绕在海因里希耳边，吐出鲜红的信子，引诱他走向危险的深渊。他当然清楚莱伯茨生命的家伙不可能是什么好人，但他已经没有了别的选择——他迫切地需要力量。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「少废话。东西带来了吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「当然了。这件事，我可不会忘记。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"实验员打开冷藏箱，取出一支没有粘贴任何标签的药剂，抽进注射器里。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「转化药剂已经准备好了，我想，你应该清楚它的效果吧？它会给你获得更强力量的资质，当然，也伴随着一点小小的风险。这一针下去，可就没有回头路了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「无所谓，反正命运从来没给过我任何退路。」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.1049e8819bc1f","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"驱散，禁疗，减益，增伤"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 114|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性暴击，效果命中，效果命中 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"驱散，禁疗工具人，pve重构兵祸，奥洛拉驱散增伤有不错的表现，pvp中对肉队的禁疗也有不错的效果"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.40c2363e9c1fe","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12疾驰+8时光+6讯光天击"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.01e16842bb3ed","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"胡狼/万魔法典"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.607ed15092015","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐攻略"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"待补充..."}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_283/h_300/50364/842288/2025/7/18/993845.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"bKSTPMamgMsoWAIp","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
